notes: Source-level pre-flight all pass. PNG render requires mmdc on PATH — run: mmdc -i content/m1-computational-thinking/week-2/3-the-professional-rules-of-ai-use/2-5-the-70-30-rule-ai-implements-you-specify-and-verify/artifacts/diagram.mmd -o content/m1-computational-thinking/week-2/3-the-professional-rules-of-ai-use/2-5-the-70-30-rule-ai-implements-you-specify-and-verify/artifacts/diagram.png -w 1400 -b transparent

findings.detail: Side-by-side role contrast matches intent exactly: HUMAN subgraph (yellow, 30%) contains Write the Spec → Verify Output + Revise Spec; AI subgraph (purple, 70%) contains AI Implements. Decision diamond 'Meets spec?' outside subgraphs routes to green 'Accepted' on Yes, back to Revise Spec on No — loop-back is explicit and traceable to corpus §5.5 Verification Loop. All six color tiers correctly applied: hitl=yellow for all three human nodes, auto=purple for AI Implements, act=blue for decision, done=green for Accepted.

No out-of-scope nodes. Every label traces directly to corpus §5: 'Write the Spec' → §5.2, 'AI Implements' → §5.1, 'Verify Output' → §5.3, 'Meets spec?' → §5.3/5.5, 'Revise Spec' → §5.5, 'Accepted' → §5.5. No adjacent concepts (e.g. 'prompt engineering', 'fine-tuning') included.

preflight.single_path_per_column: n/a — intentional decision loop, not a linear flow
